zh.lifeSummary: 當Sigurd Syr King of Ringeringe於大約0970年出生時，他的父親Halfdan Sigurdsson41歲，母親Tora Ranesdatter41歲。他於大約0997年與Åsta Astrid Gudbrandsdatter of Uplands, Queen of Norway在挪威結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1018年享年49歲，埋葬在挪威奧斯陸。

zh-hans.Nidarnes, Trondheim, Sør-Trøndelag, Norw: 挪威奧-特洛德拉格特洛德海姆
zh-hans.Ringerike, Buskerud, Norway: 挪威布斯克呂郡林格利可
zh-hans.Hadaflyke, Oppland, Norway: 挪威奧-特洛德拉格奧普藍德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sigurd Syr King of Ringeringe于大约0970年出生时，他的父亲Halfdan Sigurdsson41岁，母亲Tora Ranesdatter41岁。他于大约0997年与Åsta Astrid Gudbrandsdatter of Uplands, Queen of Norway在挪威结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1018年享年49岁，埋葬在挪威奧斯陸。

nameMeanings.name: Syr
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written ស, from a Khmer word meaning e.g. ‘white, fair’. Compare   Sar   1.
Cambodian: written សរ, from a Khmer word meaning ‘arrow’. Compare   Sar   2.

variants.name: Sar
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Hak, Pang, Ry, Thay, Leang, Hai, Him, Chan, Heang, Sarin.  Cambodian Chamroeun, Savoeun, Sokhom, Vuthy.
Cambodian: written ស, from a Khmer word meaning e.g. ‘white, fair’. Compare   Sor   1.
Cambodian: written សរ, from a Khmer word meaning ‘arrow’. Compare   Sor   2.

nameMeanings.name: Sigurd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old Norse personal name from sigr ‘victory’ + vöðr ‘guardian’.

historicEvents.title: Christianity to Norway
historicEvents.description: "King Olav Tryggvason and King Olav Haraldsson ""The Holy"" brought Christianity to Norway."

en.lifeSummary: When Sigurd Syr King of Ringeringe was born about 0970, his father, Halfdan Sigurdsson, was 41 and his mother, Tora Ranesdatter, was 41. He married Åsta Astrid Gudbrandsdatter of Uplands, Queen of Norway about 0997, in Norway. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1018, at the age of 49, and was buried in Oslo, Norway.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sigurd Syr King of Ringeringe est né environ 0970, son père, Halfdan Sigurdsson, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Tora Ranesdatter, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Åsta Astrid Gudbrandsdatter of Uplands, Queen of Norway environ 0997, à Norvège. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1018, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Oslo, Norvège.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sigurd Syr King of Ringeringe um 0970 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Halfdan Sigurdsson 41 und seine Mutter Tora Ranesdatter 41. Er hat um 0997 in Norwegen Åsta Astrid Gudbrandsdatter of Uplands, Queen of Norway geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1018 im Alter von 49 Jahren und wurde in Oslo, Norwegen begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sigurd Syr King of Ringeringe è nato il circa 0970, il suo padre, Halfdan Sigurdsson, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Tora Ranesdatter, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Åsta Astrid Gudbrandsdatter of Uplands, Queen of Norway circa 0997, nel Norvegia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1018, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Oslo, Norvegia.

ja.Nidarnes, Trondheim, Sør-Trøndelag, Norw: ノルウェースoル-トルoンデラグトロンドヘイム
ja.Ringerike, Buskerud, Norway: ノルウェーブスケルドリンジャーアイク
ja.Bergen, Hordaland, Norway: ノルウェーホールダランドバージェン
ja.Ringerike, Norway: ノルウェーヴィケンリンジャーアイク
ja.Hadaflyke, Oppland, Norway: ノルウェースoル-トルoンデラグオップランド
ja.lifeSummary: Sigurd Syr King of Ringeringeが約0970年に生まれた時，父Halfdan Sigurdssonは41歳，母Tora Ranesdatterは41歳であった。約0997年にノルウェーでÅsta Astrid Gudbrandsdatter of Uplands, Queen of Norwayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1018年に49歳で死去し，ノルウェーオスロにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sigurd Syr King of Ringeringe(이)가 대략 0970년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Halfdan Sigurdsson(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Tora Ranesdatter(은)는 41세였다. 그는 대략 0997년 노르웨이에서 Åsta Astrid Gudbrandsdatter of Uplands, Queen of Norway(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1018년 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 노르웨이 오슬로에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sigurd Syr King of Ringeringe nasceu aproximadamente 0970, seu pai, Halfdan Sigurdsson, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Tora Ranesdatter, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Åsta Astrid Gudbrandsdatter of Uplands, Queen of Norway aproximadamente 0997, em Noruega. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1018, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Oslo, Noruega.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sigurd Syr King of Ringeringe родился около 0970 г., его отцу по имени Halfdan Sigurdsson было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Tora Ranesdatter, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Åsta Astrid Gudbrandsdatter of Uplands, Queen of Norway около 0997 г. в местности Норвегия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1018 г. в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности ослоу, Норвегия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sigurd Syr King of Ringeringe nació aproximadamente 0970, su papá, Halfdan Sigurdsson, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Tora Ranesdatter, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Åsta Astrid Gudbrandsdatter of Uplands, Queen of Norway aproximadamente 0997, en Noruega. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1018, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Oslo, Noruega.
